description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.4 Docker image with a global before_script that runs npm install and a cache of node_modules/. Define four stages: lint, test, release_test, and report. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs npm run lint and is tagged with docker. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm t, is tagged with docker, and is excluded for tag pipelines. Add a release_test job in the release_test stage that runs npm t, is tagged with docker, runs only on tags, allows failure, and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact that expires in 7 days. Add a pages job in the report stage that runs only on tags, allows failure, creates a public directory, moves coverage/ into public/, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact.
